title: Silicone Air Fryer Liners 2 Pack Reusable Non-Stick Dual Basket Air Fryer Liner Mats for Double Drawer Dual Air Fryer and Steaming Basket Accessories Heat Resistant (Round)
features: Maintain a clean and tidy air fryer with the help of these convenient reusable air fryer mats. Crafted in classic round or square shapes these grey air fryer liners are made from silicone to serve as a protective barrier, preventing food residue from sticking to the air fryer basket and facilitating easy clean up after cooking.

This Set of 2 Silicone Air Fryer Liner are available in 2 DIFFERENT SHAPES – Round (Liner Diameter: 20cm and Liner Holes 0.6cm) OR Square (Liner Length: 21cm x Width: 21cm x Liner Holes 0.7cm). They will fit most types of air fryers and can be used up to 450°F/220°C. NOTE – ONLY ONE OF YOUR CHOSEN SHAPE AND SIZE SHALL BE SENT OUT.

NON STICK AIR FRYER LINERS – A practical and time-saving solution to easily maintain an air fryer. Designed with a non-stick surface, these silicone air fryer liners are the perfect solution to ensure it remains clean, and no residue of food sticks to the bottom of the air fryer. The air fryer mat is crafted to provide a snug fit, so all your food cooks evenly and without any mess.

EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION – To ensure even heat distribution while cooking, these air fryer liners are crafted with evenly spaced perforated holes, guaranteeing seamless airflow all the way round food and consistent heat distribution during the cooking process. This feature allows your food to achieve crispiness without sticking.

HIGH QUALITY SILICONE – For reusable use and durability, these air fryer liner is crafted from high quality silicone. Silicone is heat resistant and has a flexible nature; hence, no matter how many times it is used, it will resist common forms of damage, such as cracks, chips, or scratches. It’s a convenient option than having to rely on single-use parchment paper.
